title: Electric Parking Brake Service Mode
symptoms: Rear brake pad replacement required (EPB integrated caliper)
C1605 EPB Rear Caliper Service Required code

OPEN_mode: Shift selector in PARK or NEUTRAL
CLOSE_mode: Caliper hardware reassembled and torqued to spec
Brake fluid reservoir at correct level

warnings: SAFETY CRITICAL: Always verify caliper position before driving
Do NOT sit in vehicle or place hands near calipers during retraction
Retraction/extension takes 3-5 seconds — motor movement audible
Do NOT drive until CLOSE mode completed after pad installation
New pads require ~200 miles bedding-in — avoid hard stops initially

steps.technical_detail: Verify ABS/EPB ECU communication (TesterPresent 0x3E 0x80 to 0x760). Confirm all mode-specific prerequisites met (visual checks only — cannot verify electronically).
steps.caution: All visual pre-checks must be confirmed by mechanic before proceeding

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03 to ABS/EPB ECU (0x760). Required to access EPB IOControl commands.
steps.caution: If rejected: verify ignition is ON and vehicle is stopped

steps.description: EPB OPEN: Retract Rear Calipers — OR — EPB CLOSE: Extend Rear Calipers
steps.technical_detail: UDS IOControlByIdentifier (0x2F) for DID 0xC200 (Toyota EPB piston control). Control option byte 0x03 = enableInputOutputControl. Command byte: 0x01=retract (OPEN/service), 0x02=extend (CLOSE/restore). Full request: 2F C2 00 03 [CMD].
steps.caution: If IOControl rejected: check parking brake released, vehicle stationary, no active EPB fault codes

steps.technical_detail: Wait 5 seconds for electric motor to complete caliper movement. Send TesterPresent (0x3E 0x80) every 1 second to keep session alive during wait.
steps.caution: Listen for motor stopping — should complete within 5 seconds

steps.technical_detail: Read DID 0xC200 to confirm caliper moved to correct position. UDS ReadDataByIdentifier (0x22).
steps.caution: Non-fatal if read fails — verify position visually if needed

steps.technical_detail: IOControlByIdentifier with control option 0x00 (returnControlToECU). Returns EPB motor control back to ABS ECU normal operation.
steps.caution: Non-fatal if this step fails, but always attempt before closing session

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x01. After OPEN: install pads then run CLOSE. After CLOSE: pump pedal 5-10 times, verify fluid level, test parking brake.
steps.caution: After CLOSE: pump brake pedal 5-10 times to seat pads before driving

OPEN.purpose: Retract pistons to service position for brake pad installation

CLOSE.purpose: Extend pistons back to operating position after pad installation

outcome_summary: Electronically retracts (OPEN) or extends (CLOSE) rear EPB caliper pistons to facilitate brake pad/rotor service. Eliminates need for manual mechanical retraction tool on EPB-equipped vehicles.
